title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, co-founders of Corgi, rebuilt the insurance industry from the ground up by questioning legacy defaults rather than modernizing existing carriers. After 2 years of regulatory challenges and multiple near-failures, their Series A raised $108M, with the company now projecting several hundred million ARR.
